_comment: Your key database. Host this file (see options below) and point KEY_DB_URL at its RAW url. Each key: hwid ('' = no lock, or paste a device id to lock), expiry (0 = never, or a unix timestamp), note (your label).

ALICE-7F3K-9D2P.note: alice - expires 2026-01-01, locks to first device once you fill hwid
